name: Web feature-first folder architecture refactor
description: Refactor apps/web/src from mixed app/views/components layering into feature-first ownership, keep App Router thin, remove views, normalize feature naming, and update canonical frontend docs.

evidence.description: Approved design doc defines feature-first ownership, thin App Router rule, views deprecation, naming decisions, and migration phases.
Active ExecPlan defines phased migration, standards constraints, GitNexus impact checks, verification path, and harness/doc updates.
Plans index now records the web feature-first folder refactor as completed.
Canonical frontend folder-structure reference now defines feature-first ownership and removes views as a valid placement layer.
Component structure reference now points thin route files at feature page orchestrators under features/<domain>/pages.
Frontend architecture guide now codifies app route -> feature page -> feature-local component -> shared component import direction.
Progress log records the full migration completion, final verification, and low-risk GitNexus change detection result for the feature-first web refactor.
